zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Brome於1320年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利時，她的父親John Brome20歲，母親Agnes Yorkshire15歲。她於1335年之前與Johannis Le Carter II在英國英格蘭越可爾貝弗利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Brome于1320年出生在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利时，她的父亲John Brome20岁，母亲Agnes Yorkshire15岁。她于1335年之前与Johannis Le Carter II在英国英格兰越可爾貝弗利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Brome was born in 1320, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Brome, was 20 and her mother, Agnes Yorkshire, was 15. She married Johannis Le Carter II before 1335, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1370, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Brome est née en 1320, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Brome, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Agnes Yorkshire, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Johannis Le Carter II avant 1335, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1370, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Brome 1320 in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Brome 20 und ihre Mutter Agnes Yorkshire 15. Sie hat vor 1335 in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Johannis Le Carter II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 50 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Johannis Le Carter II prima del 1335, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Bromeが1320年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーで生まれた時，父John Bromeは20歳，母Agnes Yorkshireは15歳であった。1335年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベバーリーでJohannis Le Carter IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Brome(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Brome(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Yorkshire(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1335년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에서 Johannis Le Carter II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Brome родилась в 1320 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Brome было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Yorkshire, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannis Le Carter II перед 1335 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
